items.title: Replace Geist Sans with reading serif and clean sans for UI
items.intent: The body font strategy has changed: prose uses a reading serif (Source Serif 4, Literata, or Newsreader), UI elements use a clean sans (Inter or system-ui), and code uses a monospace (JetBrains Mono or similar). Geist Sans was never loaded and is no longer the target. Update the @theme font stack and load the chosen fonts.
steps: Remove Geist Sans from @theme font-sans declaration
Add reading serif font: choose Source Serif 4, Literata, or Newsreader — load via Google Fonts or Fontsource
Update @theme: --font-serif for prose body, --font-sans for UI (Inter or system-ui), add --font-mono for code
Add font loading links to Base.astro head
Verify all three font stacks render correctly in browser devtools

acceptanceCriteria.text: Reading serif font is loaded and declared in theme
Monospace font is declared in theme for code blocks

items.groomingNotes: Priority confirmed at must. Every visitor sees broken body font — falls back to system-ui silently. Fontsource npm package is the recommended fix for Astro projects (import in global.css, no CDN dependency). Low effort, high visual impact. Should ship in sprint 1.
